description_long: This is a pair of oval-shaped sunglasses with thin, metallic frames and dark, opaque lenses. The frame features a full-rim design, encircling each lens with a slender metallic border. The temples are straight and narrow, with a slight curve at the ends for a secure fit behind the ears. Adjustable nose pads are attached to the bridge, providing comfort and stability for the wearer. The overall style is minimalist and classic, suitable for both casual and formal urban settings. No visible brand logo or decorative embellishments are present on the frame or lenses.
description: A pair of oval sunglasses with thin metallic frames and dark lenses, featuring a minimalist and classic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the oval lenses, full-rim frame, and dark tint of the sunglasses.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin, straight temples and the profile of the frame and nose pads.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curvature of the temples and the symmetrical alignment of the lenses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other temple and the side profile of the frame and nose pads.
attribute_frame_design: The frame is oval-shaped with a full-rim structure, featuring thin, minimalist metallic rims and straight, slender temples that curve slightly at the ends. The design is classic and understated, with no visible embellishments or decorative elements.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are dark and opaque, with a solid black tint that provides full coverage and privacy. There is no visible gradient, mirroring, or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a simple, narrow metallic bar connecting the two lenses, equipped with adjustable nose pads for comfort and fit.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thin, straight, and unadorned, with a slight curve at the tips for secure placement behind the ears. No patterns, engravings, or decorative details are visible.
